modules.sql: SELECT t.transaction_id, t.account_id, COALESCE(a.customer_id, 0) AS customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, t.txn_type, t.amount, t.description, t.txn_timestamp, t.as_of FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.account_id AND t.as_of = a.as_of LEFT JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id AND t.as_of = c.as_of WHERE t.amount > 500
